name: @konclave/frost
description: A reusable browser primitive for FROST threshold signatures on Zcash Orchard (rerandomized redpallas): real DKG, group signing, ECIES sealing, and RTS social recovery, with the secret share never leaving the device. A thin, typed wrapper over Konclave's WebAssembly core.
author: Deega Labs
//: This package wraps the compiled WebAssembly core published as `konclave-wasm` (the wasm-pkg artifact from ui/src/wasm-pkg). Install it alongside this SDK and pass the .wasm URL to init(). The large .wasm binary is intentionally NOT bundled here; see the README for how to obtain and point at it.
